calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Dec-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, not contested, and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed and Wells Fargo has presented sufficient evidence showing its entitlement to judgment in its favor and against defendant Cedric Calub in the amount of $8,102.62 plus allowable costs.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (301/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
